session.assistant:
## Results Report: `make fast-ci`
**Status: FAILED (Exit code 2)**
### Summary
The `make fast-ci` command failed due to formatting issues detected by Prettier. However, most checks passed successfully:
**Passing Checks:** - Lint (ruff): All checks passed - Format check (ruff): 1626 files already formatted - Markdown check: OK - Exec reference check: OK - Type checking (ty): All checks passed - Unit tests (erk): 5488 passed in 11.42s - Unit tests (erk-dev): 136 passed in 4.29s - Unit tests (erk-statusline): 112 passed in 0.79s - Unit tests (erkbot): 114 passed in 1.55s
**Failing Checks:** - Prettier check: Code style issues found in 2 files
### Prettier Issues
2 files need formatting: - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
These files would be reformatted if Prettier is run with the `--write` flag.
